source: deal-scout (deal feeds + Amazon profitability) — see ai-system/deal-sourcing-system.md
reason: Deal tracking isn't live yet — the real sources (scout/deals/) are Slickdeals RSS (no key needed, already wired) and Best Buy's Products API (needs BESTBUY_API_KEY, see HUMAN_TODO.md); both collect deals today, but the matcher that turns a collected deal into an Amazon-matched, profit-checked pick (Prompt D2) isn't built yet, so nothing surfaces here until it is. Until then this is honestly empty. (Code Review 2026-07-02, Findings CS4/CS5 — this used to reference FMTC/LinkMyDeals, which scout/deals/ never actually implemented.)
principle: Source where the best sale / cashback / coupon is TODAY; stack discounts for a moat.
